executives.name: Kasper Rørsted
executives.background: Kasper Rørsted was the CEO of Adidas and previously the CEO of Henkel. He has extensive experience in global consumer goods and digital transformation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President (2005–2007); Vice Chairman of the Management Board (2007–2008); Chief Executive Officer (2008–2016)
